rulings.Case Title: WINFIELD INTERNATIONAL INC. VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
rulings.Calendar Matter: DEMURRER TO PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE/ PROHIBITION/ CERTIFICATION
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for June 29, 2017 line 1. RESPONDENT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO's DEMURRER TO PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE/ PROHIBITION/ CERTIFICATION SUSTAINED with leave to amend. This petition as currently asserted is barred by the Statute of Limitations. Petitioner's options of compliance available per SF Planning Code 415 have been limited to 7 on-site BMR units since 2003. See Defendant's RJN, Ex. D, page 2, paragraph B; Ex. E, "Exhibit A," paragraphs 13-16; Ex. H, last sentence of paragraph 1. The Court also notes that Petitioner fails to provide any authority for the proposition that Petitioner has a right to pick and change the mode of compliance with the inclusionary housing requirements at any time during the life-time of the project.= (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: DANGER PANDA, LLC VS. DONN MAIAVA LAUNIU ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for June 29, 2017 line 8. DEFENDANTs DONN LAUNIU and OLGA LAUNIU's MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT DENIED.= (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: DANGER PANDA, LLC VS. DONN MAIAVA LAUNIU ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for June 29, 2017 line 8. DEFENDANTs DONN LAUNIU and OLGA LAUNIU's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT OVERRULED, Complaint alleges sufficient facts to state a claim for detriment cause by wrongful occupation per CC 3334. The action is stayed pending the resolution of possession part of the Unlawful Detainer complaint, which both sides concede will be determinative re: "wrongful occupation" element of this action. Within 15 days of notice of entry of judgment in Unlawful Detainer action this action shall either be dismissed (Opposition 13:1-2) or answer shall be filed. = (501/REQ)
